subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Ancient Days maketh mention of His loved ones and counseleth that which leadeth to the exaltation of the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان قدم اولیای خود را ذکر مینماید و وصیت میفرماید بانچه سبب ارتفاع امرالله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @scarcity of receptive souls, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun
